description: Audit the local SeisComP Data Structure (SDS) archive at /home/ga/seiscomp/var/lib/archive and generate a CSV report of all available waveform data for the 2024 Noto earthquake. Extract the Stream ID (Network.Station.Location.Channel), Start Time, End Time, and Sample Rate (in Hz) for all 2024 miniSEED waveform files in the archive. Save the report to ~/reports/waveform_manifest.csv with the header row: StreamID,StartTime,EndTime,SampleRate. Ensure timestamps are in an ISO-like format (e.g., YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS) reflecting the actual data boundaries within the files.
